summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex AI Platform iteration 19 - Chatbot v2, DevOps Agent WebSocket, Alpha Vantage fallback, and Games module. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend chatbot tab and storefront widget verified working.

issues: Test title shows numeric ID '1776972075.4973445' instead of proper store name - appears to be test data

seed_data_creation: Test handoff tickets created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) Storefront Chatbot v2 with deep knowledge system prompt - responds to shipping/products questions with real data, (2) HANDOFF detection working - complaint messages trigger handoff:true, (3) Chatbot handoff endpoint creates support tickets with WhatsApp deep-links, (4) Client/Owner chatbot config with notify_whatsapp field persists correctly, (5) DevOps Agent WebSocket streaming works - receives ready/thinking/final/complete events, (6) Market quotes endpoint returns simulated data when ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY is empty (intentional), (7) Games module serves /api/game-engine.js and /api/game-test correctly, (8) Frontend chatbot tab shows notify_whatsapp input (data-testid='chatbot-notify-whatsapp'), (9) Storefront chatbot widget opens with welcome message and suggestion chips.

features_verified.storefront_chatbot_chat: ✅ POST /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/chatbot responds with reply, session_id, handoff fields
features_verified.chatbot_deep_knowledge: ✅ Chatbot responds to shipping/products questions using project data
features_verified.chatbot_handoff_detection: ✅ Complaint messages ('ابغى ارجاع طلبي') trigger handoff detection
features_verified.chatbot_handoff_endpoint: ✅ POST /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/chatbot/handoff creates ticket with WhatsApp links
features_verified.client_chatbot_config: ✅ GET/PUT /api/websites/client/chatbot/config with ClientToken auth works, notify_whatsapp persists
features_verified.market_quotes: ✅ GET /api/websites/market/quotes returns simulated quotes (ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY empty - intentional)
features_verified.games_module: ✅ GET /api/game-engine.js returns JavaScript, GET /api/game-test returns HTML
features_verified.frontend_chatbot_tab: ✅ Client dashboard chatbot tab shows notify_whatsapp input (data-testid='chatbot-notify-whatsapp')
features_verified.frontend_storefront_widget: ✅ Storefront chatbot FAB button opens modal with welcome message and suggestion chips

mocked_apis.alpha_vantage: ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY is empty - quotes use simulation (intentional per requirements)
mocked_apis.whatsapp: Uses wa.me deep-links, not Cloud API push (intentional per requirements)
